tasks.instruction: Set up a recurring monthly donation starting on the first day of next month to a fund that provides tuition assistance for young singers, choosing the smallest suggested monthly amount that is at least $25, opting to cover processing fees, and proceed to the final on-site review step without using an external payment service.

tasks.instruction: Submit an online application for a need-based tuition scholarship for the 2025–2026 choir season, indicating that the singer is currently enrolled, selecting a household income range whose upper limit is below $60,000, and providing short written responses where required.

tasks.instruction: For a December evening concert in the current year that features advanced ensembles and requires paid tickets, choose a mid-priced ticket tier under $50 per ticket, select two adjacent reserved seats in the same row at that price, and proceed to the final on-site order review page without leaving the website.

tasks.instruction: From the youth ensembles, choose one that accepts a 13-year-old, holds rehearsals on a weekday that end by 7:30 PM, and lists annual tuition under $600, then begin the online registration for that ensemble for the upcoming season.
